title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.170 - Surveyor to execute orders of court
text:
60.170.  Surveyor to execute orders of court. — The county surveyor shall execute all orders given to him directly by any court of record, for surveying or resurveying any tract of land, the title of which is in dispute before such court, and all orders of survey for the partition of real estate.
(RSMo 1939 § 13198, A.L. 1989 H.B. 190, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11579; 1919 § 12717; 1909 § 11299
